title_zh: PyTorch性能分析（第二部分）：从nn.Linear到融合MLP

summary_zh: 本文介绍了如何在PyTorch中进行性能分析，从基础的nn.Linear层开始，逐步优化到融合多层感知机（MLP），以提升模型运行效率。
summary_en: This article details performance profiling in PyTorch, starting from the basic nn.Linear layer and gradually optimizing to a fused multilayer perceptron (MLP) to improve model execution efficiency.
why_it_matters_zh: 通过深入分析和优化PyTorch模型结构，开发者可以显著提升训练和推理速度，优化计算资源的使用。
why_it_matters_en: By profiling and optimizing PyTorch model components, developers can significantly enhance training and inference speed while optimizing computational resource usage.
